work_authorisation_routes.name: EU Blue Card
eligibility_criteria: University degree of at least 3 years in a relevant field
Job offer with salary at or above the Blue Card threshold
Occupation must correspond to the field of qualification

work_authorisation_routes.name: Skilled Worker Visa (Fachkräftevisum)
eligibility_criteria: Recognised degree in business, technology, or a related field
Concrete job offer from a German employer
Salary meets or exceeds the sector minimum

required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related discipline
3+ years of product management experience with demonstrable outcomes
language_requirements: German B2 frequently required for PM roles involving German-speaking stakeholders
English C1 sufficient for international product teams
credentials.degree_equivalency_notes: Check the anabin database for degree recognition. Business and management degrees from most accredited universities are recognised. A Statement of Comparability from KMK may be requested.

market_demand.notes: Product Manager demand in Germany is moderate. Berlin leads with tech-focused PM roles. German language skills significantly widen the opportunity pool beyond international companies.
